name: Merc2Reborn
description: Online multiplayer revival (FESL emulation + UDP relay) and a Lua execution bridge for Mercenaries 2: World in Flames.

mods.name: Multiplayer Restore
mods.description: Restores online multiplayer via a private FESL/Theater/GameSpy server at refesl.live. UDP relay means hosts don't need port forwarding. Auto-detects exe version.

mods.name: Lua Bridge
mods.description: Exposes the game's Lua 5.1.2 runtime via a localhost TCP REPL on 127.0.0.1:27050 for runtime modding. Ships with raw Python console tools.

mods.name: Debug Overlay
mods.description: In-game debugging overlay for development and testing.

mods.name: Dev Cheat Menu
mods.description: Developer cheat menu for testing and exploration.
